title: ai-agents-lab
content: ai-agents-lab is a progressive collection of small AI agent projects, ordered from foundational patterns to more advanced systems.

title: Tool-Using Assistant project
content: The first project teaches a minimal agent loop that decides when to call tools and when to answer directly.

title: Rome
content: Rome is the capital of Italy and is known for landmarks such as the Colosseum and the Roman Forum.

title: Paris
content: Paris is the capital of France and is associated with landmarks such as the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre.
